---
Name: Feature Request
About: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Cylixin
Title: "[FEATURE] Short description of the feature"
Labels: enhancement
Assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve. For example, "I am always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
